_comment: Active `matrix` rows are executed by bin/run-playwright-sauce-matrix.mjs (EU Central hub). Playwright → Selenium Grid → Sauce only drives Chromium-based browsers on the remote VM; see https://playwright.dev/docs/selenium-grid and README (test:sauce:chrome). Rows under `_disabled_matrix` are not run — kept as documentation with reasons.

_disabled_matrix._reason: Playwright Selenium Grid path to Sauce does not run Firefox remotely; use CI (multi-browser projects) or run Playwright with ENABLE_MULTI_BROWSER_PROJECTS=true locally, or another Sauce product.
WebKit/Safari is not supported on Playwright → Selenium Grid → Sauce; run WebKit locally or use native Appium/WebDriver on Sauce outside this script.
Mobile Chrome emulation (Playwright project MobileChrome) is not targeted by this desktop Selenium Grid Sauce flow; use local mobile projects or Sauce real-device offerings.
Mobile Safari emulation (Playwright project MobileSafari) is not targeted by this desktop Selenium Grid Sauce flow; use local mobile projects or Sauce real-device offerings.
